name: @chbrain/khai-engine-repair
description: khai engine content, the repair domain: what a relationship undergoes when rupture is addressed rather than abandoned
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: what a relationship undergoes when rupture is addressed rather than abandoned

card.wire: Attaches at Process. The root (process_repair.md) declares repair as a relational process: the movement through rupture, accounting, restitution, and integration that rebuilds a damaged relationship.
card.issue: Four phases: rupture (the break is acknowledged; both parties know something is damaged), accounting (the responsible party names what happened and why), restitution (concrete action addresses the harm), integration (the repair is received; the relationship is remade on new terms).
card.require: The law is declared once in the project's Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the root. Each persona links, under Projection, the phase it is currently in.
card.enforce: Structure is checked; coherence is judged. The kit verifies that the law is declared and each persona links a real repair phase. Whether the phase is true to the relationship is semantic, not mechanical.
card.setup: Declare the law in the Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the root. Give the persona its current phase under Projection. Phases may recur if earlier phases are incomplete.
